structured_pruning.suql_query:
SELECT movie_id, title, year, runtime, director, genres
FROM movies
WHERE director LIKE '%Comedy%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Acting%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Direction%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Soundtrack%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Visuals%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Effects%'
  AND year > 90
  AND answer(review, 'Does the review express an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?') = 'Yes';
structured_pruning.structural_sql:
SELECT movie_id, title, year, runtime, director, genres
FROM movies
WHERE director LIKE '%Comedy%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Acting%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Direction%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Soundtrack%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Visuals%'
  AND genres LIKE '%Effects%'
  AND year > 90;
structured_pruning.semantic_predicate: Does the review express an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?

question: Which Comedy movies over 90 minutes have reviews that are overall unfavorable but still explicitly praise at least one specific aspect such as acting, direction, soundtrack, visuals, or effects?
